  Log:
  Jokosher is a simple yet powerful multi-track studio. With it you can
  create and record music, podcasts and more, all from an integrated
  simple environment.
  
  WWW: http://www.jokosher.org/
  
  PR:             ports/137751
  Submitted by:   Anonymous
